finding_results.notes: Stress signaling now varies by leverage: folder movement creates visible trace (wet ring), billing pages are physically surfaced, concession is timed against clause text, Priya materially boxes terms, Anika tension is externalized through notebook elastic, and signature pressure is grounded in drying ink/rain timing. Repetitive forehead-rub/laugh/look templates were reduced and diversified without softening scene intensity.

summary: Addressed the prose/copyedit finding by replacing repetitive stress-marker constructions with varied, room- and object-anchored beats that carry new information and shift leverage while preserving chapter voice, continuity, and negotiated-stakes intensity.
